mainEntity.name: Vocational rehab benefits after workplace injury in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: Vocational rehab benefits after workplace injury in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah provides retraining if can't return to old job, up to 401 weeks.

suggestedAnswer.text: Labor Commission approves plan. Insurers resist; prove job market barriers. Key for older workers post-injury.

name: Vocational Rehabilitation in Utah Workers' Comp
description: Utah provides retraining if can't return to old job, up to 401 weeks.
